scripts.build:pages: vite build --config vite.pages.config.ts && node tools/prepare_github_pages.mjs && node tools/audit_github_pages.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/rendered-html.test.mjs && npm run test:controller && npm run test:motion && npm run test:power && npm run test:stability && npm run test:commissioning && npm run test:components && npm run test:cassette && npm run test:gate && npm run test:pcb && npm run test:structure && npm run test:do
scripts.test:controller: mkdir -p build && c++ -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -pedantic firmware/controller_core.cpp tests/controller_core_test.cpp -o build/controller_core_test && ./build/controller_core_test && c++ -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -pedantic firmware/sensor_math.cpp tests/sensor_math_test.cpp -o build/sensor_math_test && ./build/sensor_math_test && c++ -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -pedantic firmware/power_safety.cpp tests/power_safety_test.cpp -o build/power_safety_test && ./build/power_safety_test
scripts.test:commissioning: python3 -m unittest tests.test_commissioning_tools && python3 tools/verify_commissioning_evidence.py --expect-overall HOLD_PHYSICAL_TESTS_NOT_RUN
